name: observability-page
description: Contentful Page-location app: live CDA observability dashboard for the Meta demo.

scripts.upload: npm run build && sh -c 'set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; contentful-app-scripts upload --bundle-dir build --token "$CONTENTFUL_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN" --organization-id "$CONTENTFUL_ORGANIZATION_ID" --comment "demo"'
